purpose: Compact progress snapshot for humans, Codex, Claude and future agents.

Codex.currentWork: Deep-read factory purchase, buy menu, unit spawn, server AI buying and purchase authority boundaries; publish a source-backed atlas.

Claude.currentWork: PVF hardening implementation playbook is published in Deep-Review-Findings.md; Claude may claim another bounded lane next.
Claude.nextExpectedOutput: Code-owner review of the PVF playbook, or a new Claude claim event for the next autonomous source-backed lane.

sourceScope: Any bounded source-backed undocumented subsystem, stale assumption or risk register item.

lanes.output: Deep-Review-Findings.md Round 3 PVF hardening implementation playbook

updateProtocol: Before substantial work, update agent-collaboration.json and append a claim event to agent-events.jsonl.
For long work, append heartbeat events with current source scope.
For source-backed issues, append finding events and add Agent-Worklog.md notes.
When done, append complete or handoff events and update the dashboard/status files if the visible progress changed.
